bird.name: 蓝胸八色鸫
bird.summary: 蓝胸八色鸫（学名：Pitta steerii），是八色鸫科八色鸫属的一种，为菲律宾的特有种。全球活动范围约为118,000平方千米。该物种的保护状况被评为易危。 蓝胸八色鸫的平均体重约为92.0克。栖息地为亚热带或热带的湿润低地林。

locations.name: Rajah Sikatuna Protected Landscape

locations.name: Samar Island Natural Park
locations.summary: The Samar Island Natural Park, in Samar, is the largest contiguous tract of old-growth forest in the Philippines.

relations.subject: 蓝胸八色鸫
relations.evidence: Occurs in a few protected areas in Rajah Sikatuna Protected Landscape in Bohol and Samar Island Natural Park but actual protection and enforcement from illegal logging and hunting are lax

relations.subject: 蓝胸八色鸫
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 蓝胸八色鸫
relations.evidence: This species' main threat is habitat loss with wholesale clearance of forest habitats as a result of logging, agricultural conversion and mining activities occurring within the range
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
